notes: ONS UK reported r=+0.49 (sport facilities/10k vs adult activity rate). Saudi result is negative and not statistically significant at n=13.
Restricting to pure football pitches; same negative pattern.
Negative correlation strongest for women. Population-weighted r=-0.70. Driven by Riyadh+Makkah pattern: low density, high women PA.
Men show essentially zero rank correlation. Pop-weighted slight negative.
Academy density not predictive of overall PA.
Without the two megaregions (50%+ of population) the correlation flips to slightly positive but remains insignificant.
Excluding megaregions, women PA vs density correlation also flips positive but is essentially zero. The negative correlation is entirely a Riyadh+Makkah artefact.
